productDisplayName: J. DEL POZO Women In Black Eau De Toilette Spray 100 ml
description: Despite the dark and heavy flask, the In Black fragrance by Jesus Del Pozo is a light and sweet fragrance.It has top notes of black cherry, grapefruit and rose accord with a heart of black iris, peach wine, jasmine and violet. The base is oriental with licorice, musk, vanilla, patchouli and cedar.
